name: Llevana Nedaren
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) female wearing lower-class clothing - a collared shirt, green felt linens, and huntsman moccasins. Carries her key, a bread loaf, and a small amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: vocal, outraged, principled, passionate
Role: Llevana Nedaren is a farmer living in Cheydinhal. She is known throughout town as being the most vocal about the corrupt practices of the local City Guard. If left up to her, the Captain of the Guard, Ulrich Leland, would be dragged out into the street and killed.
Home Location Information: Her house in Cheydinhal.
Daily Routine: Llevana wakes at 6am and, provided it isn't raining, immediately heads outside for her morning stroll around the area of the northeastern gate. She heads back home at 11am and sits down for a well-deserved lunch. At 2pm she heads out for another walk, this time in the city's southwestern corner by Willow Bank. Regardless of weather, she only heads back home at 8pm, spending the next four hours relaxing before heading to bed at midnight.
Views on Corruption: Llevana is passionate about exposing and opposing the corrupt practices of Cheydinhal's City Guard. Her outrage at Captain Ulrich Leland's abuses is so strong that she believes he deserves to be dragged into the street and killed for his crimes.
Personality - The Principled Activist: Llevana is the most vocal citizen in Cheydinhal about the City Guard's corruption. She's principled and unafraid to speak out against injustice, even when it means challenging those in authority. Her passion for justice drives her outrage at Ulrich Leland's practices, and she doesn't shy away from expressing her belief that he deserves the harshest punishment for his crimes against the citizens.
author: Bethesda
